home.voiceButtonHint: Activate voice recognition to give a command

status.ready: Ready. Press the button and say a command.
status.capturePrompt: Double tap the screen to take a photo

voice.readPrompt: Reading the text. Point the camera at the text and double tap the screen to take a photo.
voice.describePrompt: Describing the scene. Point the camera and double tap the screen to take a photo.
voice.banknotePrompt: Identifying the banknote. Point the camera at the banknote and double tap the screen to take a photo.
voice.help: Available commands: Read, Describe, Banknote, Navigate, Help, Repeat, Stop, Faster, Slower, Vibration on, Vibration off, Russian language, English language
voice.speechRateMax: Speech rate is already at maximum
voice.speechRateMin: Speech rate is already at minimum

errors.cameraPermission: Camera permission is required. Please enable it in settings.
errors.micPermission: Microphone permission is required. Please enable it in settings.
errors.modelNotLoaded: Download a language pack first. Connect to the internet and try again.
errors.cameraBusy: Camera is being used by another app — close it and try again.
errors.noText: No text detected — move the camera closer.
errors.noObjects: Could not recognize objects — try pointing the camera differently.
errors.featureDisabled: This feature is not available yet.
errors.banknoteLowConfidence: Not confident — bring the banknote closer and flatten it.
errors.navigationApiKeyMissing: Yandex Maps API key is required.
errors.navigationOffline: Internet connection is required for navigation.
